data.title: Justin Wolfers criticizes media's focus on S&P 500 highs as "economic illiteracy," highlights global market surge of 30% compared to US market's 18%. Annual U.S. stock market underperformance against global peers by 12% noted. Wolfers warns of distorted view of domestic economic health without global context.
data.description: University of Michigan professor Justin Wolfers criticizes media coverage of the S&P 500 hitting record highs, calling it "economic illiteracy." Despite U.S. markets growing by 18%, global markets excluding the U.S. have surged by 30% over the past year. Wolfers argues that Americans have underperformed the global market by 12%, leading to a "miserable year for the American investor." He believes the media's focus on domestic market performance creates a distorted view of the economy. Wolfers also raises concerns about the accuracy of economic data beyond the stock market.

data.title: MediaTek partners with DENSO to create custom automotive SoCs for advanced driver-assistance systems.
data.description: In Hsinchu on December 26, 2025, MediaTek, a renowned company in semiconductor solutions, revealed their collaboration with DENSO, a top automotive technology firm, to create a specialized automotive System-on-Chip (SoC) solution. This initiative aims to leverage the strengths of both companies in the industry, with MediaTek's expertise in semiconductor solutions and DENSO's position as a key player in automotive technology. The partnership is focused on developing a custom SoC solution designed specifically for automotive applications, highlighting the importance of tailored technological advancements in the field.

data.title: IBA signs contract to install Proteus PLUS solution at Seoul St. Mary’s Hospital, South Korea, with 3 rooms.
data.description: On December 26, 2025, IBA, a renowned company in particle accelerator technology and a top provider of proton therapy solutions for cancer treatment, disclosed a new deal. The Belgian company signed an agreement with the Catholic University of Korea, specifically Seoul St. Mary’s Hospital, a major healthcare facility in South Korea. The contract involves the installation of a Proteus® PLUS 1 solution in Seoul. IBA's position as the global leader in this field is underlined by this latest venture, which promises to bring cutting-edge cancer treatment technology to the region.

data.title: Advice from a Bitcoiner who lost $700M: Tips for newcomers, vets, & skeptics in crypto world for 2026.
data.description: In 2026, James Howells, known for mistakenly discarding a hard drive containing 8,000 Bitcoin, provides guidance for those entering, experienced in, or doubtful of the industry.

data.title: LLVision supported award-winning AR research project; received AIS Impact Award 2025 at ICIS 2025 Conference in Nashville.
data.description: LLVision, located in Nashville, Tennessee, was recognized for its collaboration on an international research project that was honored with the AIS Impact Award 2025. The award was presented at the ICIS 2025 Conference in Nashville. LLVision played a significant role in utilizing augmented reality technology for this project, showcasing the potential of this innovative technology in various applications.
